nasb.text: Then the one who brought the news replied, “Israel has fled before the Philistines and there has also been a great slaughter among the people, and your two sons also, Hophni and Phinehas, are dead, and the ark of God has been taken.”

esv.text: He who brought the news answered and said, “Israel has fled before the Philistines, and there has also been a great defeat among the people. Your two sons also, Hophni and Phinehas, are dead, and the ark of God has been captured.”

cnv.text: 報信的人回答，說：“以色列人在非利士人面前逃跑，傷亡慘重，你兩個兒子何弗尼和非尼哈也都死了，民中被殺的甚多，　神的約櫃也被搶去了。”

ccb.text: 报信的答道：“以色列人被非利士人击溃，伤亡惨重，你的两个儿子何弗尼及非尼哈都死了，上帝的约柜也被掳走了。”
